current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Adjacent Bit Product Mask
current_run.description: Given an oracle for f(x) = (popcount(g(x, N) & secret)) % 2, where g(x, N) computes an N-bit integer mask representing N adjacent bit products (x_i * x_{(i+1)%N} for i=0 to N-1), and 'secret' is an N-bit integer masking these products. The i-th bit of g(x, N) corresponds to the product x_i * x_{(i+1)%N}. The task is to find the N-bit integer 'secret'. This problem features a non-linear g(x,N) function, making f(x) a non-linear boolean function.
